item.title: Version 1.9.13
item.description:
What's New in 1.9.13

  • Smarter Auto refresh — AIQuota now defaults to an adaptive Auto mode that refreshes every 1 minute while the app is active or your quota is near a threshold, then slows down automatically when your Mac is idle, offline, or in Low Power Mode.
  • Refresh setup from day one — onboarding now lets you choose your refresh preference as soon as you connect a service, so AIQuota can stay as up to date as you want from the start.
  • Clearer refresh controls — Settings now explains Auto more clearly, including that its fastest refresh cadence is 1 minute.
  • More reliable archived builds — fixed a launch issue that could prevent some exported app builds from opening after being moved into Applications.
